name: freshflow
description: B2B fresh produce ordering and warehouse management system

scripts.build: pnpm --filter freshflow-backend build && pnpm --filter freshflow-frontend build
scripts.test: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter freshflow-backend typecheck && pnpm --filter freshflow-frontend typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter freshflow-backend lint && pnpm --filter freshflow-frontend lint
